thens.value: Please enter Proposed Donor Machine Model.
Please enter Donor Machine Serial No.
Please select a value for Has part been ordered "Machine Down".
Please select a value for "Has proposed donor machine confirmed to have correct parts required?"
Please select a value for "Is higher level group number or alternative source part available?"
Please enter Part description or select a correct Part No.

identifier.raw:
([Form mode].[Is New mode] 
  || ([Form mode].[Is Edit mode] 
    && (contains([SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status],"Draft") || contains([SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status],"Saved"))))
identifier.compiled: (__fmv_New||(__fmv_Edit&&(contains(__splf_ApprovalStatus,"Draft")||contains(__splf_ApprovalStatus,"Saved")))) /*{compiledVariableMap:{"0:1:0:26:[Form mode].[Is New mode]":{"name":"__fmv_New","from":{"line":0,"ch":1},"to":{"line":0,"ch":26}},"1:6:1:32:[Form mode].[Is Edit mode]":{"name":"__fmv_Edit","from":{"line":1,"ch":6},"to":{"line":1,"ch":32}},"2:17:2:55:[SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status]":{"name":"__splf_ApprovalStatus","from":{"line":2,"ch":17},"to":{"line":2,"ch":55}},"2:77:2:115:[SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status]":{"name":"__splf_ApprovalStatus","from":{"line":2,"ch":77},"to":{"line":2,"ch":115}}}}*/

identifier.raw:
([Form mode].[Is New mode] 
  || ([Form mode].[Is Edit mode] 
    && (contains([SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status],"Draft") || contains([SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status],"Saved"))))
identifier.compiled: (__fmv_New||(__fmv_Edit&&(contains(__splf_ApprovalStatus,"Draft")||contains(__splf_ApprovalStatus,"Saved")))) /*{compiledVariableMap:{"0:1:0:26:[Form mode].[Is New mode]":{"name":"__fmv_New","from":{"line":0,"ch":1},"to":{"line":0,"ch":26}},"1:6:1:32:[Form mode].[Is Edit mode]":{"name":"__fmv_Edit","from":{"line":1,"ch":6},"to":{"line":1,"ch":32}},"2:17:2:55:[SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status]":{"name":"__splf_ApprovalStatus","from":{"line":2,"ch":17},"to":{"line":2,"ch":55}},"2:77:2:115:[SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status]":{"name":"__splf_ApprovalStatus","from":{"line":2,"ch":77},"to":{"line":2,"ch":115}}}}*/

formula.raw:
not(contains ([SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status] , "Draft") ||
contains ([SharePoint Columns].[Approval Status] , "Saved"))

properties.name: group_control_2
properties.headerText:
Request Number :{{__splf.{"id":"Title","displayName":"Request Number","dataType":{"type":"string","items":null},"uniqueName":"__splf_Title","contextPrefix":"__splf","source":"SharePoint Columns"}}} 
Borrowed Parts Request

properties.name: richtext_label_23
properties.text: * Note : Use of borrowed parts for a warranty repair must be approved by CAT. Please get approval from your warranty analyst first.
properties.textTranslation: * Note : Use of borrowed parts for a warranty repair must be approved by CAT. Please get approval from your warranty analyst first.

properties.name: richtext_label_27
properties.text: (Please state "Unknown" if you do not know the donor machine model and serial number)
properties.textTranslation: (Please state "Unknown" if you do not know the donor machine model and serial number)

properties.name: richtext_label_28
properties.text: Has proposed donor machine confirmed to have correct parts required?
properties.textTranslation: Has proposed donor machine confirmed to have correct parts required?

properties.name: richtext_label_29
properties.text: Is the Donor Machine Part New Or Used?
properties.textTranslation: Is the Donor Machine Part New Or Used?

properties.name: richtext_label_30
properties.text: Is higher level group number or alternative source part available?
properties.textTranslation: Is higher level group number or alternative source part available?

properties.name: richtext_label_38
properties.text: Where is the part being sourced from?
properties.textTranslation: Where is the part being sourced from?

properties.name: richtext_label_48
properties.text: Update DBS and attached a copy of the request to machine ID within the Online Cabinet?
properties.textTranslation: Update DBS and attached a copy of the request to machine ID within the Online Cabinet?
